idea-plugin.name: NLPL Language Support
idea-plugin.description:
Native support for the NLPL (Natural Language Programming Language) in IntelliJ-based IDEs.

NLPL is a general-purpose programming language designed to read like natural English prose while providing full low-level control.

Features

  • Syntax highlighting for .nlpl files
  • LSP integration: code completion, go-to-definition, find references
  • Hover documentation via NLPL language server
  • Inline diagnostics (errors and warnings)
  • Signature help for function calls
  • File type recognition with custom icon
  • Support for IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, CLion, WebStorm, and Rider

Requirements

NLPL must be installed: pip install nlpl or from source.

The LSP server starts automatically when you open a .nlpl file.
